theme: How might TU Delft better support student wellbeing and academic engagement?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: First-years are really stressed about workload and fitting in. We should have counseling available.

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: That costs a lot. We need something sustainable with limited resources.

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: What if we trained peer mentors to do basic stress management workshops?

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: That could work, but they'd need proper training. How would we scale it?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: Maybe start in the first-year commons area, once a week during lunch?

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: Low barrier to entry, good visibility. We could measure attendance and gather feedback.
